name: slop-02-within-radius
description: Stress test (Slop/research/slop_tests/02_within_radius.json): ~30 randomly-rotated boxes populate a region; count how many random points fall within a 30-unit radius of EACH of two query points. Exercises the graft cross-product (2 query points x N random points -> Smaller Than -> Mass Addition per-branch), per-wire graft vs flat routing from the same sources, and a layout with many cross-group wires + relays.

setup.vlmDescription: A 3D scatter of roughly 30 small blue boxes at random positions and random rotations, overlapped by two large translucent orange spheres (radius 30) centered at two distinct points. The boxes inside each sphere are the ones being counted. A text panel reports two integer counts.
